title: Player Utils
description: A Minecraft mod that improves the gameplay experience with various visual and client-side features.
body:
PlayerUtils mod adds several new features to the game that will make your gameplay more enjoyable and convenient.

**Commands:**

_/coords_ - copy your current position to the clipboard

_/coords [player]_ - send your position to the specified player in dms

_/social friend/enemy add/remove [player]_ - adds or removes a player to/from your friends or enemies list

_/social friend/enemy clear_ - clears the friends/enemies list

**Features:**

**Movement:**

_AutoSprint_ - automatically sprints

_NoJumpDelay_ - removes jump delay

_NoSlow_ - allows you to open the inventory or chat in a portal, and move while the options screen is open

**Render:**

_PlayerColor_ - changes the color of friends/enemies/yourself in chat, the tab list, alters player name colors, and player model

_CameraDistance_ - adjusts the camera distance

_NoRender_ - allows disabling certain in-game rendering elements

_BetterHands_ - reduces item size in hand, changes hand bobbing

_BetterArmor_ - changes armor color

_ScreenRatio_ - changes the screen aspect ratio

**Misc:**

_FreeLook_ - allows free third-person camera movement without changing head position

_BetterChat_ - saves chat history upon server exit and increases the maximum number of messages in the chat

_BetterTab_ - increases the maximum number of players displayed in the tab list

**HUD:**

_EffectList_ - lists active effects on the player, sorted by remaining duration (effects with shorter durations are rendered at the bottom)

_Coordinates_ - displays player's coordinates (in brackets, coordinates for the Nether divided by 8, and coordinates for the Overworld multiplied by 8)

ArmorHud - shows the player's armor status (including durability)
